configImprovements.title: Optimize polling interval for system events
configImprovements.rationale: Reduces CPU usage and disk I/O when the workspace is idle, without significantly impacting responsiveness.

policyChanges.title: Stricter automated commit validation
policyChanges.change: Enforce mandatory dry-run testing before executing automated git commits
policyChanges.rationale: Prevents malformed commits and ensures all staged changes meet project standards.

routingChanges.rationale: Superior context handling and adherence to strict architectural guidelines during large-scale changes.

suggestions.title: Optimize polling interval for system events
suggestions.summary: system.pollingIntervalMs -> 5000. Decreases background resource consumption by ~20%.

suggestions.title: Stricter automated commit validation
suggestions.summary: Enforce mandatory dry-run testing before executing automated git commits (low). Prevents malformed commits and ensures all staged changes meet project standards.

suggestions.title: Routing for complex-refactoring
suggestions.summary: Prefer gemini (confidence 92%). Superior context handling and adherence to strict architectural guidelines during large-scale changes.
